legal.termsSection1Content: By accessing and using Houseiana, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
legal.termsSection2Content: Houseiana provides an online platform that enables users to list, discover, and book short-term accommodations around the world. You must be at least 18 years old to use our services.
legal.termsSection3Content:
To access certain features of our platform, you must register for an account. You agree to:

• Provide accurate, current, and complete information
• Maintain and update your information
• Keep your password secure and confidential
• Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use
legal.termsSection4Content:
As a guest, you agree to:

• Treat properties with respect and care
• Follow house rules set by hosts
• Leave properties in the same condition as you found them
• Pay all fees and charges on time
• Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
• Not exceed the maximum number of guests
legal.termsSection5Content:
As a host, you agree to:

• Provide accurate descriptions and photos of your property
• Honor confirmed bookings
• Maintain your property in good condition
• Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
• Have proper insurance coverage
• Pay applicable service fees
• Respond to booking requests and messages promptly
legal.termsSection6Content:
When you make a booking, you agree to pay all charges, including:

• Accommodation fees
• Service fees
• Cleaning fees
• Additional guest fees
• Applicable taxes

Payment is processed through our secure payment system. We use third-party payment processors and do not store your complete payment information.
legal.termsSection7Content:
Cancellation policies vary by listing and are set by the host. Please review the cancellation policy before booking. Refunds are subject to the applicable cancellation policy.

In certain circumstances, we may allow cancellations outside the standard policy for events like natural disasters or other extenuating circumstances.
legal.termsSection8Content:
Houseiana charges service fees to both guests and hosts. These fees help cover the costs of running the platform, including customer support, payment processing, and insurance.

• Guest service fee: Typically 10-15% of the booking subtotal
• Host service fee: Typically 3-5% of the booking subtotal
legal.termsSection9Content:
After each booking, guests and hosts can leave reviews. Reviews must be:

• Honest and accurate
• Based on personal experience
• Respectful and non-discriminatory
• Free from conflicts of interest
• Compliant with our content policy

We reserve the right to remove reviews that violate these guidelines.
legal.termsSection10Content:
You may not:

• Violate any laws or regulations
• Discriminate against others
• Post false or misleading information
• Interfere with or disrupt our services
• Attempt to gain unauthorized access
• Use our platform for commercial purposes without authorization
• Harass, abuse, or harm others
• Circumvent service fees
legal.termsSection11Content: All content on Houseiana, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is our property or that of our licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not use our content without permission.
legal.termsSection12Content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Houseiana and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of our services.
legal.termsSection13Content: Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of our services shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the laws of Qatar. You waive your right to participate in class action lawsuits.
legal.termsSection14Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes by email or through our platform. Your continued use of our services after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.termsSection15Content: We may suspend or terminate your account and access to our services at any time, with or without notice, for any reason, including if you violate these terms.
legal.termsSection16Content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Qatar, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
legal.termsSection17Content:
If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:

Email: legal@houseiana.com
Phone: +974 1234 5678
Address: Doha, Qatar
legal.privacySection1Content: Welcome to Houseiana. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website or use our mobile application and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
legal.privacySection2Content: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
legal.privacySub1Content: First name, last name, username, date of birth, and gender.
legal.privacySub2Content: Billing address, email address, and telephone numbers.
legal.privacySub3Content: Bank account and payment card details.
legal.privacySub4Content: Details about payments to and from you and other details of bookings you have made.
legal.privacySub5Content: IP address, browser type and version, time zone setting, browser plug-in types, operating system and platform.
legal.privacySub6Content: Username, purchases made, interests, preferences, feedback, and survey responses.
legal.privacySub7Content: Information about how you use our website and services.
legal.privacySub8Content: Your preferences in receiving marketing from us and your communication preferences.
legal.privacySection3Content:
We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:

• To register you as a new customer
• To process and deliver your bookings
• To manage payments, fees and charges
• To communicate with you about your bookings
• To manage our relationship with you
• To improve our website and services
• To deliver relevant content and advertisements
• To comply with legal obligations
legal.privacySection4Content: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed. In addition, we limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties who have a business need to know.
legal.privacySection5Content: We will only retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes we collected it for, including for the purposes of satisfying any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements.
legal.privacySection6Content:
Under certain circumstances, you have rights under data protection laws in relation to your personal data, including the right to:

• Request access to your personal data
• Request correction of your personal data
• Request erasure of your personal data
• Object to processing of your personal data
• Request restriction of processing your personal data
• Request transfer of your personal data
• Right to withdraw consent
legal.privacySection7Content: Our website may include links to third-party websites, plug-ins and applications. Clicking on those links or enabling those connections may allow third parties to collect or share data about you. We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.
legal.privacySection8Content: We may transfer your personal data outside of Qatar. Whenever we transfer your personal data out of Qatar, we ensure a similar degree of protection is afforded to it by ensuring appropriate safeguards are implemented.
legal.privacySection9Content: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
legal.privacySection10Content:
If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:

Email: privacy@houseiana.com
Phone: +974 1234 5678
Address: Doha, Qatar
legal.cookieSection1Content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the owners of the site.
legal.cookieSection2Content:
We use cookies and similar technologies only for the following purposes:

• Authentication: To verify your identity and keep you logged in
• Preferences: To remember your settings and preferences
• Security: To protect against fraudulent activity

The Houseiana mobile app does not use advertising or tracking cookies, and does not track you across apps or websites owned by other companies.
legal.cookieSub1Content: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website.
legal.cookieSub2Content: These cookies remember your choices — such as your language and display settings — so we can give you a more personal experience. They are not used to track you or to deliver advertising.
legal.cookieSub3Content: These cookies help us detect and prevent fraudulent activity and keep your account secure. They are not used for advertising or to track you across other apps or websites.
legal.cookieSection4Content: The Houseiana mobile app does not use third-party advertising, analytics, or tracking cookies, and does not share your information with advertising networks or data brokers. We only rely on trusted service providers required to operate the app, such as secure sign-in and payment processing, and these are used solely to deliver the service you request.
legal.cookieSection5Content:
You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your computer and you can set most browsers to prevent them from being placed.

However, if you do this, you may have to manually adjust some preferences every time you visit a site and some services and functionalities may not work.
legal.cookieSection6Content: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings or by using our cookie consent tool available on our website.
legal.cookieSection7Content: We may update our Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Cookie Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
legal.cookieSection8Content:
If you have any questions about our Cookie Policy, please contact us at:

Email: privacy@houseiana.com
Phone: +974 1234 5678
Address: Doha, Qatar

support.helpInfo: Find answers to the most common questions below, or contact our support team.
support.faqQuestion1: How do I make a booking?
support.faqAnswer1: Find a property you like, select your dates and guests, then tap "Reserve" to proceed to payment.
support.faqQuestion2: How do I cancel a booking?
support.faqAnswer2: Go to Trips, open the booking you want to cancel, and tap "Cancel Booking". Refund depends on the host's cancellation policy.
support.faqQuestion3: How do I contact my host?
support.faqAnswer3: Open your booking from the Trips tab and tap "Contact Host" to start a conversation.
support.faqQuestion4: How do I become a host?
support.faqAnswer4: Tap "List your property" from your profile to start the listing wizard and publish your first property.
support.faqAnswer5: We support multiple payment methods including credit/debit cards, PayPal, Paymob, and SADAD. All transactions are secured.
support.faqQuestion6: What if there is a problem with my stay?
support.faqAnswer6: Contact your host first. If the issue is unresolved, reach out to our support team via the Contact Support option.
support.name: Name
support.subject: Subject
support.messageMinLength: Please provide more details (at least 20 characters)

wizard.wizardPhotosChooseFromGallerySingle: Select a photo from your device
wizard.wizardPhotosChooseFromGalleryMulti: Select one or more photos from your device
wizard.wizardPhotosUseCameraUpload: Use your camera and upload it right away
wizard.wizardPhotosListingDesc: Choose high-quality photos that clearly show the rooms, amenities, and overall feel of your place.
wizard.wizardPhotosRemoveMessage: This photo will be removed from the listing draft.
wizard.wizardPhotosStepSubtitle: Add at least 5 photos to show guests what makes your space special.
wizard.wizardPhotosCoverSectionDesc: This is the first photo guests will see. Choose your best shot.
wizard.wizardPhotosEnoughPhotos: Great. Your listing already has enough photos to continue.

wizard.wizardPhotosAddMorePlural: Add {count} more photos to unlock the next step.
wizard.wizardPhotosUploading: Uploading photo. Please wait before continuing.
wizard.wizardPhotosEmptyState: No photos added yet. Start with the exterior, bedroom, bathroom, and main living area.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.infoLoggedIn: These sections are built from live properties and your current saved homes.
recommendations.infoLoggedOut: These sections are built from live properties. Sign in to see recommendations influenced by your saved homes.
recommendations.savedHomesSubtitle: These are the properties currently saved to your account.
recommendations.similarSubtitle: Matched using the same cities or property types found in your saved homes.
recommendations.guestFavoritesSubtitle: Live listings already marked as guest favorites.
recommendations.topRatedSubtitle: Highest-scoring listings from the current catalog.
recommendations.noDataMessage: Recommendations will appear here when the property catalog is available from the backend.
